title: Dekton 19'' Toolbox With Lid Storage & Lift Out Carry Tray Includes Bonus Drill-Durable Carry Handle| Padlock Eye For Added Security| Ideal For Engineers, Workshops, Tool Storage|7 Storage Compartment
features: Robust Construction & Durability: Built from high-quality, impact-resistant plastic, the Dekton 19'' Toolbox is designed to withstand heavy use and rough handling in demanding environments. The sturdy material ensures long-lasting performance, making it ideal for engineers, workshops, and everyday tool storage needs.

Convenient Lift-Out Carry Tray: This toolbox features a practical lift-out carry tray that offers additional organization and easy access to frequently used tools. The tray is perfect for separating smaller items from larger tools, enhancing efficiency and keeping your workspace tidy.

Spacious Storage Compartments: The toolbox includes 7 well-designed storage compartments, including a large bottom section and multiple smaller trays. This layout allows for versatile storage of various tools, parts, and accessories, ensuring that you have everything you need at your fingertips.

Secure Lid with Padlock Eye: For added security, the toolbox is equipped with a padlock eye, allowing you to secure your tools and valuable equipment. This feature is essential for protecting your gear from theft and ensuring peace of mind during transport or storage.

Durable Carry Handle: The toolbox comes with a heavy-duty carry handle that provides a comfortable and secure grip. The ergonomic design of the handle ensures easy transportation of the toolbox, even when it's fully loaded with tools and equipment.
description: Introducing the Dekton 19'' Toolbox with Lid Storage & Lift-Out Carry Tray – the ultimate solution for all your tool organization needs. Crafted for durability and convenience, this toolbox is ideal for engineers, workshop professionals, and DIY enthusiasts alike. Designed to withstand the rigors of heavy use, it features a robust construction that ensures longevity and reliability. This spacious toolbox includes a practical lift-out carry tray, allowing you to easily access and transport essential tools without having to dig through the entire box. The lift-out tray is perfect for keeping smaller tools and accessories organized and within reach, making it easier to tackle projects efficiently. Additionally, the toolbox's lid storage provides extra space for frequently used items, so you can keep everything you need close at hand. For added security, the Dekton toolbox is equipped with a padlock eye, allowing you to secure your tools and equipment with a padlock of your choice. This feature provides peace of mind, knowing that your valuable tools are safely stored and protected. The toolbox also includes a durable carry handle that ensures comfortable and easy transportation, whether you're moving it from the workshop to the job site or simply storing it away. The toolbox is designed with seven storage compartments, offering ample space to organize various tools and accessories. This thoughtful layout helps prevent clutter and ensures that each item has its designated spot, making it easier to find what you need quickly.
